label: Autotrophic
description: "Self-nourishing through sunlight and nutrients drawn from the soil rather than by consuming other organisms; the mode proper to plant-creatures such as the mandrake."

label: Crabs eater
description: "A diet consisting of crabs and similar shellfish; the creature feeds on crustaceans."

label: Elephant blood
description: "A specialized carnivorous diet of elephant blood, sought by the dragon of Pliny's tradition to cool its own heat; the creature lies in wait to drain the elephant."

label: Man eater
description: "A carnivorous diet directed especially at human flesh; the creature preys on people by preference, beyond ordinary predation on animals."

label: Starvation
description: "A creature physiologically incapable of sustaining itself, unable to digest any food due to its contradictory hybrid nature."

label: Wind
description: "A creature sustaining itself entirely by consuming air or wind, rather than solid food or water."
